title: Cannot Update Email Address
description: Customer is trying to update their account email but receives a validation error.

title: Subscription Plan Not Reflecting Upgrade
description: Customer upgraded to the Premium plan but their account still shows the Basic plan.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Customer encounters a 500 server error when attempting to complete checkout.

title: Delay in Order Shipment
description: Customer reports that their order has not shipped even though the estimated shipping date has passed.

title: App Notifications Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving push notifications despite enabling them in settings.

title: Billing Cycle Date Incorrect
description: Customer reports that their billing cycle date changed unexpectedly.

title: Feature Access Denied
description: Customer cannot access features included in their current subscription tier.

title: Unable to Delete Account
description: Customer is attempting to permanently delete their account but the option is not working.

title: Refund Status Not Updated
description: Customer received a refund confirmation email but the dashboard still shows 'Pending'.

title: Unable to Apply Discount Code
description: Customer’s discount code shows as invalid even though it hasn’t expired.

title: Profile Changes Not Saving
description: Customer updates their profile information but changes revert after refreshing the page.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Code Delayed
description: Customer reports that 2FA codes are arriving 10–15 minutes late.

title: Invoice Shows Incorrect Amount
description: Customer states that their latest invoice reflects an incorrect total compared to their subscription plan.
